detail.name: Sustainable Upgrades Investment Loan
detail.description: The Sustainable Upgrades home and investment loan products are basic variable rate loans designed for borrowers with an eligible Westpac home or investment loan who are looking for a low variable rate loan to fund energy efficiency and/or climate resilience upgrades for their residential property.

features.additionalInfo: Access a 2nd loan: An extra home loan or investment loan secured against your property, with no package or offset available. Borrow up to $50k.
Home improvements: Help take control of your energy consumption with upgrades like solar panels and batteries. Plus, you could make bushfire, storm, and flood resilient upgrades.
Cool rate, no monthly fees: You won't pay any loan establishment or monthly account fees.
Flexible repayments: Pay it off as fast as you like with unlimited extra repayments (redraw unavailable).
The product provides options which includes repayment holiday and a progressive drawdown features.
Loan Payment Method: Direct Debit (preferred), Direct Credit, Branch Payment, Internet or Phone Banking
Repayment frequencies includes weekly, fortnightly or monthly
The product includes extra repayment features.

Sustainable upgrade offers from our approved providers. Qualifies for our cool interest rate. We've teamed up with Origin for quotes on home energy upgrades from Origin's network of local approved installers: Battery, Solar panels, EV charger, Hot water heat pump, explore offers and government rebates.

constraints.additionalInfo: Loan Maximum - Interest only period 9 months

eligibility.additionalInfo: You must have or be approved for a Westpac home or investment loan with a minimum loan size of $150k
The property securing your Westpac home or investment loan must be the property being upgraded for energy-efficiency or climate-resilience
Lenders mortgage insurance must not be applicable at time of applying.
Individuals, Discretionary or Family Trusts (Individual trustees only)
You've chosen from our list of eligible energy-efficient or climate-resilient upgrades and funds spent on these upgrades only.
